General.Name: Guming Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Guming Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a freshly made beverage company in the People's Republic of China. The company operates a franchised tea store retail network under the Good me brand, as well as manages company-operated stores. Its stores offer fruit tea beverages, milk tea beverages, and coffee beverages and others. The company also trades in ingredients and other related products of beverages and equipment. In addition, it is involved in the warehousing and logistics management; research and development; and information technology development activities, as well as provides supply chain services. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
